title: Thread
description: A complete steel thread accepted by `i2code plan` thread-mutating commands (insert-thread-before/after, replace-thread).

title.description: Steel thread title (rendered as the text after `Steel Thread N:`).

introduction.description: Multi-paragraph prose introducing the thread (rendered between the thread header and the first task).

tasks.description: Ordered list of Task objects. Tasks are renumbered automatically by the CLI; the JSON does not carry task numbers.
